data.content: Implemented prompt-guidance cleanup in work/foolery-9c9a-impl-20260312-132154: removed README and audit-doc references, stopped runtime packaging from copying PROMPT.md, deleted the prompt CLI test, and relaxed remaining test expectations. Sanity gates passed in /private/tmp/foolery-9c9a-20260312-132154: bun run lint (warnings only), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build.
